reasoning: Target style preserves title/author/publisher capitalization and uses plain integer values for publish_year and page_count. Identifier columns like id and isbn_clean are preserved. Previous errors likely came from over-normalizing genres; this spec avoids transforming genres and only applies minimal publisher whitespace cleanup and numeric casting where source floats should match target ints.
